name: email
description: Email — read inbox, send to whitelisted contacts via IMAP/SMTP
author: sapphire

event_sources.name: email_message
event_sources.label: New Email
event_sources.description: New unread email received on an account

task_fields.label: Email Account
task_fields.help: Which email account this daemon monitors. Only this account will be polled.

task_fields.label: Auto-reply to sender
task_fields.help: ON (default): AI's response is sent as an email reply to the sender — the common case. OFF: the daemon still triggers the AI on incoming mail, but no reply email goes out (useful for filing, memory-only monitoring, or letting the AI decide per-message via explicit tool calls).

settings.label: Poll Interval (seconds)
settings.help: How often to check for new emails. Minimum 30 seconds.

settings.label: Allow sending to any address
settings.help: WARNING: When enabled, the AI can email anyone — not just whitelisted contacts. It can use recipient IDs from People OR type an email address directly. Use with caution.

confirm.title: Allow Unrestricted Email
warnings: The AI will be able to email ANY address — not just whitelisted contacts
This bypasses the People whitelist safety net entirely
